mode.description: `remove_tree` (default full clean) or `prune_by_age` when `--older-than` is set

dry_run.description: Present and true when `--dry-run` was used (no files or directories were deleted)

older_than.description: Original `--older-than` argument when mode is prune_by_age

bytes_freed.description: Sum of deleted file sizes in bytes (prune_by_age, non–dry-run)

files_would_remove.description: Count of files that would be deleted (`--dry-run`, prune_by_age or remove_tree)

bytes_would_free.description: Sum of file sizes that would be freed (`--dry-run`)
